payload.answer: The same statement appears to have been delivered three times. No memory should be committed automatically from this repair step; choose how to handle the repeated input.
repair_options: Treat the three identical deliveries as one candidate memory: “Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.”
Ignore the retries as duplicate input and make no memory change.
Ask for clarification before saving, since “Sam from Goldman” may need disambiguation from other people named Sam.
